title: gilia liniflora subsp. pharnaceoides
intro: Gilia liniflora subsp. pharnaceoides, also known as the glandular gilia or pharnaceoid gilia, is a plant species in the phlox family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gilia liniflora subsp. pharnaceoides include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
